name: charger-config
description: Charge-current step selection and charging-status bit decode tool. emb-agent core keeps only the abstract spec and does not include any charger-controller implementation.
notes: This is not a battery-algorithm simulator; it only handles discrete configurations and state interpretation already defined by the manual.
If a chip supports temperature curves, termination current, or charging-stage switching, extend it further in an external adapter.
Vendor/chip bindings must not enter emb-agent core.
